/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/run_benchmarks.dir/Tests/benchmarks/OrderBookBenchmarkv2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_benchmarks.dir/Tests/benchmarks/MultithreadedBenchmark.cpp.o -o run_benchmarks  libtrading_lib.a _deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a libimgui_lib.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL _deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a
